spec: Hologram OS boots on a dumb static host (GitHub Pages) as-is: holo-fhs-sw.js (the in-browser twin of holo-serve-fhs.mjs, sharing lib/holo-fhs-map.mjs) maps the flat URL space onto the FHS tree and provides cross-origin isolation — no server cooperation

results.name: the host is a dumb static host (flat /home.html 404s; only the physical FHS path exists)
the SW controls the page and maps /boot.html → the real rEFInd menu (flat URL, dumb host)
cross-origin isolation works on Pages (SW stamps COOP/COEP — SharedArrayBuffer ready)
the SDDM greeter (QML engine + _shared modules + theme) loads entirely through the SW
the greeter page is cross-origin isolated too
